verdicts.note: City-council service provides a real elected record, but without state legislative tenure it is genuinely intermediate between proven legislative record and outsider renewal.
General parental involvement in schools does not establish the rubric's parental-control or traditional-values pole on curricula, reproductive rights, gender policy, or anti-discrimination law.

review_notes: All 7 original scored pairs were reviewed exactly once (5 upheld, 1 adjust, 1 refuted). No omitted axis had sufficiently specific dossier evidence for a supported missing proposal.
